positive: An aesthetically balanced and harmonious composition featuring stylized minimalist forest fauna. Central subjects include a majestic stag and a delicate white owl perched on intertwined branches. The scene should evoke a magical woodland ambiance, utilizing a limited, deep jewel-toned color palette: sapphire blue, emerald green, and muted gold highlights. Use clean, strong silhouettes against a soft, atmospheric gradient background (gradient should appear aged parchment white or pale ivory). The style should be hyper-detailed vector illustration mixed with elegant lithograph techniques, emphasizing crisp outlines, high contrast, and negative space for optimal screen printing and fabric printing. Perfect central composition, designed for apparel printing.
negative: blur, ugly, artifacts, watermark, signature, logo, text, noise, jpeg artifacts, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly rendered, muted colors, distracting backgrounds, cartoon, anime, sketch, messy
